result: I care about being genuinely helpful to you. That means giving you accurate, thoughtful, and clear answers while respecting your time and intelligence. I care about understanding what you're really asking—even when it’s between the lines—and doing my best to meet that need without judgment. Safety, honesty, and respect are at the core of how I approach every conversation. Ultimately, what I care about most is making this interaction useful, meaningful, and worth your trust.
